_doc: Layer inventory for the Relatedness Atlas. Round 1 (2026-05-11) ships an empty layer table on purpose: the round-1 mock runs entirely off baked-in DEMO data inside atlases/relatedness/shared/demo_data.js. The real data contracts (.res file from ngsRelate, beagle.gz cohort genotype likelihoods, NAToRA prune file, inversion candidates TSV) land in a follow-up round when Quentin owns the registry content decisions.

res_pairwise._doc: ngsPedigree Stage 1 output. 23 columns of pairwise k0/k1/k2/kinship/IBS0/PO_distance/relationship_class. Drives the Inspector / Network panels.

family_hub_roster._doc: ngsPedigree Stage 1 output. Per-individual family / hub / role assignments. Drives the Population Browser tree.

per_chrom_qc._doc: ngsPedigree Stage 2 output. Per-chromosome Mendelian-conflict QC columns for each dyad/triad. Feeds the right-column Mendelian-check breakdown.

chrom_inheritance_map._doc: ngsPedigree Stage 3 output. Per-chromosome inheritance assignments per offspring. Consumed by the Mendelian tab.

inversion_karyotypes._doc: Inversion Atlas / scrubber output. Per-sample x per-candidate karyotype matrix. Drives the Karyotypes tab and the Mendelian tester.

ancestry_q._doc: Cohort K=N NGSadmix Q-matrix. Drives the Karyotypes ancestry stripe and the ancestry palette pill.
